title: CVE-2026-0412 - Edge gateway auth bypass actively exploited
summary: Security teams should patch internet-facing edge gateways where pre-auth bypass is observed in active campaigns.

title: CVE-2025-9981 - Legacy VPN appliance command injection
summary: Command injection in management interface allows arbitrary command execution with system privileges.

title: CVE-2026-1020 - Mail gateway deserialization exploit
summary: Attackers are chaining authentication flaws and insecure deserialization to deploy loaders.

title: CVE-2025-8840 - Exchange plugin privilege escalation
summary: Local privilege escalation bug appears in post-compromise activity tied to commodity ransomware crews.

title: CVE-2026-0304 - Public container registry token leakage
summary: Improper token scoping in CI integrations can expose write access to shared registries.

title: CVE-2025-7711 - Endpoint agent DLL sideloading
summary: Threat actors are abusing signed binaries to sideload malicious libraries and disable telemetry.

title: CVE-2026-0115 - Hypervisor guest escape via crafted packet
summary: Data center operators should prioritize updates where multi-tenant virtualization is exposed.

title: CVE-2025-6452 - NAS management API broken access control
summary: Unauthenticated endpoint permits remote account takeover in exposed storage systems.

title: CVE-2025-6170 - Java framework OGNL injection
summary: Public exploit code enables remote execution on misconfigured application gateways.

title: CVE-2025-5803 - OT firewall web UI path traversal
summary: Industrial operators are advised to isolate management interfaces and apply firmware updates.

title: CVE-2025-5176 - CMS plugin arbitrary file upload
summary: Mass scanning activity attempts web-shell upload against unpatched content management deployments.

title: CVE-2025-4992 - Backup console insecure default credentials
summary: Credential stuffing and default-password abuse observed in opportunistic campaigns.
